<!--
⚠️ Do NOT paste secrets: API keys, sending-profile passwords, session cookies,
real recipient PII, or the contents of voltphish.db / .env. Redact before posting.
For a security vulnerability, use SECURITY.md instead of a public issue.
-->

### What happened?

A clear, concise description of the bug.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

### Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

### Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or relevant log lines (redact secrets).

### Environment

- VoltPhish version / commit: <!-- e.g. main @ abc1234 -->
- Deployment: <!-- Docker compose / bare uvicorn / other -->
- Database: <!-- SQLite (default) / Postgres -->
- Browser + OS (for UI bugs):

### Additional context

Anything else that might help — config (redacted), recent changes, etc.
